major_differences.parameter: Time Not Comfortable Based on Simple ASHRAE 55-2004
major_differences.interpretation: The modified simulation maintained the same level of thermal comfort as the baseline, indicating that cooling load reduction strategies did not compromise comfort.

major_differences.parameter: Time Setpoint Not Met During Occupied Cooling
major_differences.interpretation: Both simulations effectively maintained the cooling setpoint during occupied hours, ensuring comfort was preserved.

summary.overall_trend: The modifications successfully reduced cooling load while maintaining thermal comfort, as indicated by unchanged comfort metrics.
